<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request! Please fill in the sections below.
For first-time contributors, please read CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adds or fixes tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, build, dependencies
- [ ] `ci` — CI configuration

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Commands, screenshots, before/after, manual steps. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (build job must pass)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed (`README.md`, `INSTALL.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`)
- [ ] No secrets committed, no AC-internal hostnames or data leaked
- [ ] Conventional Commits used in commit messages

## Related issues

<!-- "Closes #123" / "Refs #456" — leave blank if none. -->
